title: Inherited Circuits, Learned Semantics: How Fine-Tuning Creates Evasion Vulnerabilities Invisible to Standard Evaluation
abstract: arXiv:2606.27091v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: LLMs fine-tuned for security classification are usually evaluated on held-out examples from the same distribution as their training data. We show that this can miss vulnerabilities introduced by fine-tuning itself: models can learn token-level indicator semantics that preserve canonical accuracy while failing under behavior-preserving transformations such as PowerShell alias substitution, command reconstruction, string construction, execution indirection, and case mutation. We study Foundation-Sec-8B-Instruct and its base model, Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, on matched PowerShell classification cohorts. Causal interventions localize the classification circuit to a late-attention route inherited from Llama rather than created by fine-tuning. Fine-tuning concentrates and semantically specializes this inherited structure, improving baseline behavior while creating transformation-sensitive attack surfaces. A three-tier evasion benchmark finds Fou

Title: Inherited Circuits, Learned Semantics: How Fine-Tuning Creates Evasion Vulnerabilities Invisible to Standard Evaluation

translated_title: 继承的电路，学习的语义：微调如何创建标准评估无法察觉的规避漏洞
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.27091v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：用于安全分类的微调大语言模型通常在与训练数据相同分布的保留样本上进行评估。我们表明，这可能会遗漏微调本身引入的漏洞：模型可以学习令牌级指示器语义，在保持规范准确性的同时，在行为保持变换（如PowerShell别名替换、命令重构、字符串构造、执行间接和大小写变异）下失效。我们研究了Foundation-Sec-8B-Instruct及其基础模型Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct在匹配的PowerShell分类队列上的表现。因果干预将分类电路定位到继承自Llama的晚期注意力路径，而非微调创建。微调集中并语义特化了这一继承结构，改善了基线行为，同时创建了变换敏感的攻击面。一个三层规避基准发现Fou
tldr: 本文揭示了微调大语言模型用于安全分类时，会引入标准评估无法检测的规避漏洞，因为微调集中并语义特化了继承的神经电路，使其在行为保持变换下失效。
en_tdlr: This paper reveals that fine-tuning LLMs for security classification introduces evasion vulnerabilities invisible to standard evaluation, as fine-tuning concentrates and semantically specializes inherited neural circuits, causing failures under behavior-preserving transformations.
